capability_claim: Measures ability to correctly translate complex multi-article contract provisions into precise numerical computations, requiring cross-referencing of structured data with procedural rules, handling of boundary conditions, and multi-step arithmetic with intermediate rounding.

closest_existing_benchmarks.name: Reimbursement Forensics (BenchBench internal)
closest_existing_benchmarks.similarity: Both require computing exact amounts from policy documents and messy evidence
closest_existing_benchmarks.differentiation: CPPC uses cumulative AIA G702 method with per-line rounding, retention thresholds, and multi-status change orders - distinct domain mechanics

closest_existing_benchmarks.name: GAIA (agent reasoning)
closest_existing_benchmarks.similarity: Both require multi-step reasoning with tool use
closest_existing_benchmarks.differentiation: CPPC has a single well-defined domain with deterministic rules, not general knowledge retrieval

scoring.normalization: Integer comparison after parsing numeric strings

baseline_results.naive_baseline: 6/30 (ignores CO status, stored conditions, retention threshold, insurance, tax)
